revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Coordinates/styles.css]]": match parent template ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Coordinates/styles.css]]": 1MM+ uses ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
5 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Coordinates/styles.css]]: Import just to get the source
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
